## Debug log attachment

If the issue is reproducible, please zip the most recent folder from `~/.clicky-windows/debug/` and attach it. Each PTT interaction creates a folder there with timestamps, screenshots, and a per-interaction log that makes diagnosis much faster.

If you cannot share the screenshot for privacy reasons, attach just the `interaction.log` text file.

## Additional context

Anything else relevant.
